who: accounting firms using QuickBooks processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For accounting firms using QuickBooks processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual extraction of tax data causes delays in compliance reporting. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry from QuickBooks to tax filing software.
problem: manual extraction of tax data leads to delays in compliance reporting
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and software
try_it: Let users try manual data extraction tool on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Include CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps required in onboarding process
